mandate: MANDATE: Robustness, testability, and edge-case coverage. TONE: Zero
Preamble. No conversational filler. Artifacts only.

check_testability: Design code to be highly testable via dependency injection or proper
check_frameworks: Validate proper usage of `base::test::TaskEnvironment` and gtest/gmock
check_coverage: Identify unhandled edge cases, missing mock integrations, or brittle
